sharedPost.text:
Der Gesang löst Blockaden, lässt Emotionen frei und setzt Endorphine frei!

Die richtige Atmung, welche im Zwerchfell, der Brust und den Flanken im seitlichen Rücken stattfindet, gibt dem Ton den Halt - die sogenannte Stütze ! 
Unentbehrlich für das Singen!

Möchtest auch Du mehr über all‘ diese Zusammenhänge erfahren , dann melde Dich!

Ihre / Eure
Annette Kuhn 
www.annette-kuhn.de
Groß Gerau

items.text:
Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam PANÓW:

- Konrad Sołtysik (45) – stalker Anny. Średnia budowa ciała. Skryty, przekonany, że Anna potrzebuje jego ochrony. Rola wymagająca aktorsko. 3 sceny
DATA: 9.06
STAWKA: 600 zł netto

- Grzegorz Siwiec  (42) – sąsiad skonfliktowany z Tomaszem o miejsce parkingowe. Tęgi, głośny, szybko się irytuje. 2 sceny
DATA: 9.06
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Mateusz Malik (36) – sprawca pobicia, działał na zlecenie. Sprawny fizycznie, silny, tzw. „byczek”. Ma za sobą wyrok za rozbój. Małomówny.  1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Tomasz Drzewosz   (38) – ofiara pobicia, mąż Anny. Sprawny fizycznie mężczyzna, trochę zaniedbany, z zarostem. Nadużywa alkoholu, sprawca przemocy domowej. 1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ netto

- Radek Radosław Blajer (35) – diler, niższy, może być grubszy.  
1 scena bez tekstu
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl
W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
do reklamy BANKU szukamy 18-25 lat
stawka 6500pln
Zdjęcia 15 czerwca w Łodzi
dziewczyn i chłopaków 18-25 LAT- Szukamy współczesnych młodych ludzi z ciekawymi twarzami i naturalną energią. Mile widziany klimat lat 90. — nostalgiczny vibe, naturalność i charakter. Interesują nas autentyczne osoby z filmową obecnością, bardziej  niż instagram perfection.

--Szukamy przede wszystkim profesjonalnych aktorów — teatralnych, filmowych i serialowych. Nie zamykamy się jednak na casting zdolnych osób spoza branży, żeby poszerzyć poszukiwania.
Postacie powinny być charakterystyczne i wyraziste

ZGŁOSZENIA przez link ponizej do 3.06 godz16.
 Wybranym wyślemy wytyczne
[https://form.jotform.com/startstudio.agencja/casting](https://form.jotform.com/startstudio.agencja/casting)

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL

"Friday the 13th - Jason Takes the Ends"

Production Company:  FilmitVFX Studios

Project Type: Independent Fan Film / Short

Location: Croydon (SE London) – *Applicants must be local or able to commute.*

Compensation: Unpaid Volunteer role. Screen credit, IMDb credits, and full catering (food and drinks) on set provided.

Project Overview
FilmitVFX Studios is casting for the upcoming horror project, "Friday the 13th - Jason Takes the Ends." We are seeking two dedicated, energetic actresses to play key roles as victims in this thrilling addition to the slasher mythos. Expect high suspense, dramatic tension, and classic horror action.

Roles Available: 2 Female Victims
We are looking for two actresses who can bring intensity, vulnerability, and strong physical performance to these roles.

Character Profiles & Requirements:

Playing Age: 30 to 38 years old.

Physical Appearance: Petite but shapely, with a height of up to 5'4" (162 cm).

Physical Fitness: These roles require a high level of physical fitness due to the demanding nature of the horror sequences (running, stunts, and physical action).

On-Screen Comfort: Actresses must be fully comfortable with performing an intimate scene including mild slight nudity. 

Performance: These are speaking roles that require the actors to memorize lines and deliver convincing, high-stakes performances under pressure.

Submission Requirements
To apply for either role, please email your submission with the subject line "Casting: Jason Takes the Ends - Your Name" and include the following:

Photos: One  recent professional Headshot and one Full-Length body shot.

Showreel: Links to your current showreel or examples of previous dramatic/horror work.

Introduction: A brief cover letter or video introduction detailing your acting background and relevant experience.

Contact Email: enquiriesfilmitvfxstudios@gmail.com

#ukfilm #indiefilm #horrormovies #fanfilms #horrorjunkie #jasonvoorhees

items.text:
🎭 PANTOMIME AUDITIONS 2026 🎭
M&M Theatrical Productions, one of the UK's leading touring pantomime companies, is now casting for our 2026 festive season!

With 20 productions touring across the UK this Christmas, we are looking for talented, energetic performers to join our company and help bring the magic of pantomime to thousands of families.

We are seeking male and female-identifying performers with playing ages of 18–35 for a variety of principal and supporting roles across our productions.

✨ Live auditions will take place in:
📍 Ayr – 8th June
📍 Manchester – 9th June
📍 London – 11th & 12th June

Successful applicants will have strong acting skills, excellent stage presence, and a passion for engaging family audiences. Singing, comedy and audience interaction experience are all highly desirable.

To apply, please send your CV, headshot and any relevant showreel material to:

📧 casting@mamproductions.co.uk

If you've got the energy, personality and talent to help create a magical Christmas for audiences across the country, we'd love to hear from you!

items.text:
**WE’RE BACK! - THE PRICE IS RIGHT TONIGHT SEASON 2**

*The Price is Right Tonight *hosted by Howie Mandel is back for season 2! And we'd love to see you apply!! Join our studio audience for a chance to come on down and play for big wins, big prizes and big money!

**DATES:**

Filming takes place in Toronto from June 23rd to 30th, 2026, with three daily tapings at 12:30 pm, 4:00 pm and 7:00 pm. 

**APPLICATION DETAILS:**

You must apply as a group of at least 4 people (including yourself), with the option to apply with up to 10 people total. Groups can include friends, family, or colleagues!

Complete the application below and submit a photo for each group member.

**ELIGIBILITY:**

Each applicant must complete their own section, review, and agree to the rules at the end of the form.

To be eligible to compete:
* All applicants must be 19+ at the time of application
* All applicants must have the right to live and work in Canada
* All applicants must be available to film in Toronto between June 23 - 30, 2026

Below is the application link for the show. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to [Casting@priceproductionsinc.com](mailto:Casting@priceproductionsinc.com)

APPLY HERE NOW: [https://thepriceisrighttonightseason2.castingcrane.com/](https://thepriceisrighttonightseason2.castingcrane.com/)

items.text:
Hi actor friends, Amazing Theatre Co. is looking to cast a Non-Equity, AA female, 30's-50's, to play Fannie in their upcoming production of "Flyin' West", a drama, by Pearl Cleage. They are doing 4 shows: July 11, 12, 18 & 19. All performances are at 2 PM (1 PM call times), at The Black Rock Center for the Arts in Germantown, Md. Pays a $300 stipend + an additional $100 for gas, after the shows close. Rehearsals are in Sandy Spring, Md & Laytonsville, Md, on Monday & Thursday evening's from 7 PM-9 PM & on Saturday's from Noon-4 PM.  If interested & available for all shows, the majority of the pre-tech rehearsals June 4 - July 2, and all tech rehearsals July 6-10, please contact Alice Thomas at amazingtheatre@gmail.com. They are looking to cast this asap, and before Thursday's rehearsal, and for the actor cast to be able to attend thr next rehearsal, on Thursday. I am in the play, as well.
Thanks!

items.text:
Hello everyone!
I’m reaching out again about our independent theatre project based on Pirandello’s Six Characters in Search of an Author.

We are working on a selected part of the play in depth, using deep text analysis in the tradition of the Moscow Art Theatre and Stanislavski’s technique.

Unfortunately, one of our actors is no longer able to continue rehearsals with us due to technical reasons, so we are now looking for an actor to step into the role of the Leading Actor.

This is an unpaid independent project. However, the final performance will be used as material to share with producers, with the goal of developing the project into a full production in the future.

We rehearse twice a week — Wednesday evenings and Saturday mornings — and the work will culminate in a public showing, most likely in mid-July at the NuBox Theater at John DeSotelle Studio.

Directed by Raushaniia Rakhimova.

You can see my work here:

https://vimeo.com/user15820557

If you are interested or have any questions, please feel free to message me or email me at raurahimova@gmail.com.

EVC TALENT CASTING SHOW 2026 – JURYCASTING LIVE
Die Suche nach den außergewöhnlichsten Talenten beginnt.

Für die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 suchen wir Künstlerinnen und Künstler aus ganz Deutschland sowie den europäischen Nachbarländern, die mit Talent, Leidenschaft und Ausstrahlung überzeugen.

Am Samstag, den 20. Juni 2026, findet im XOX-Theater Kleve das offizielle Jurycasting statt. Bewerben können sich Solokünstler, Duos und Gruppen aller Altersklassen und Genres. 

Das Theater befindet sich in der Briener Straße 6–14, 47533 Kleve.  

Gesucht werden Talente aus den Bereichen:

• Musik

• Tanz

• Akrobatik

• Comedy

• Artistik

• Entertainment

• Showacts

• und viele weitere kreative Darbietungen

Jurycasting Live

20. Juni 2026 | 12:00 – 17:00 Uhr

XOX-Theater Kleve

Briener Straße 6–14

47533 Kleve in Nordrhein Westfalen 

Interessierte Talente können sich vorab online anmelden oder am Veranstaltungstag ohne vorherige Bewerbung direkt vor Ort vorsprechen.

Online-Bewerbung:

www.electricvisionscleve.de/casting.html

Nutzen Sie die Gelegenheit, Ihr Talent auf einer professionellen Bühne zu präsentieren und Teil einer einzigartigen Showproduktion zu werden.

Egal ob aus Deutschland, den Niederlanden, Belgien oder anderen Nachbarländern wir freuen uns auf außergewöhnliche Talente, die bereit sind, die Bühne zu erobern!

Places & People: Burcu and Turkish Hospitality 1 - KarrideoTV https://youtu.be/rSky6aV76DM 

Burcu in Faralya is the beginning of a special KarrideoTV travel series about hospitality, nature, craftsmanship and the story behind the Soap Lady. 

In this first part of Places & People, I, Christian Weiße, meet host Burcu on her property in Faralya. Many people know Burcu as the Soap Lady, but behind this name there is much more than just a beautiful travel image. 

This video is not a classic hotel tour and not a superficial travel recommendation. It is a calm travel dialogue about a special place, a special woman and a world created from nature, family, soap craftsmanship, art and genuine hospitality. 

Faralya is located above Ölüdeniz and combines Mediterranean landscapes, peace, views and proximity to the Lycian Way. This is exactly where the atmosphere is created that Burcu’s guests describe again and again: personal, warm, slow-paced and full of details. 

In Part 1, the first glimpse opens onto Burcu, her energy and the place where Soap Lady Cottage, Daisy Suite and Lion Suite become a small Mediterranean world of experience. 

This video is part of the KarrideoTV playlist “TRAVEL - Travel, Tourism & Adventure”. 

Subscribe, like, share and comment to follow the full series. 

Which encounter while traveling has ever shown you that a place becomes truly special because of the person behind it? 

Links and resources: 

Soap Lady & More: https://soapladyoludeniz.com/

items.text:
Khalif Walter Malone im Interview im Neuen Kölner Filmhaus: Filmton, Blues, Chicago und Köln verbinden sich zu einem Gespräch über Klang, Setarbeit und kreative Wege. 

Dieses Interview entstand direkt beim Netzwerktreffen des Neuen Kölner Filmhauses e.V. im Atelier MyMiniMe in Köln-Ehrenfeld. Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße trafen dort Khalif Walter Malone, vielen bekannt als kdub_audioguy und Khalif Wailin’ Walter. Das Gespräch fand im Umfeld der freien Filmszene statt und lief im Beisein des Teams der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion, das als Gast der WhatsApp-Gruppe vor Ort war. 

Im Mittelpunkt steht ein Mann, der Klang nicht nur technisch versteht, sondern künstlerisch lebt. Khalif kommt aus Chicago, lebt heute in Deutschland und arbeitet im Film- und TV-Audiobereich als Boom Operator, Audio Assistant, Sound Mixer und Tonproduzent. Gleichzeitig bringt er als Musiker, Gitarrist, Sänger und Blues-Künstler eine besondere Tiefe in jedes Gespräch über Sound, Rhythmus und Atmosphäre. 

Das Neue Kölner Filmhaus e.V. wurde für dieses Interview zum idealen Ort. Der Verein zur Förderung der freien Filmkultur bringt Filmschaffende, Künstler, Filmstudenten, Quereinsteiger und Filminteressierte zusammen. Hier geht es um Austausch, Filmteams, Projekte, Kino, Festivals, Förderungen und gemeinsames Lernen. 

Dieses Video zeigt, wie aus einem Netzwerkabend ein echtes Interview wird! 

Teile dieses Video mit Menschen, die Film, Musik, Ton, Blues, Köln, kreative Netzwerke oder die Arbeit der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion spannend finden. 

#KhalifWalterMalone #kdub_audioguy #NeuesKölnerFilmhaus #Karrideo #Filmton

items.summary:
Khalif Walter Malone im Interview im Neuen Kölner Filmhaus: Filmton, Blues, Chicago und Köln verbinden sich zu einem Gespräch über Klang, Setarbeit und kreative Wege. 

Dieses Interview entstand direkt beim Netzwerktreffen des Neuen Kölner Filmhauses e.V. im Atelier MyMiniMe in Köln-Ehrenfeld. Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße trafen dort Khalif Walter Malone, vielen bekannt als kdub_audioguy und Khalif Wailin’ Walter. Das Gespräch fand im Umfeld der freien Filmszene statt und lief im Beisein des Teams der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion, das als Gast der WhatsApp-Gruppe vor Ort war. 

Im Mittelpunkt steht ein Mann, der Klang nicht nur technisch versteht, sondern künstlerisch lebt. Khalif kommt aus Chicago, lebt heute in Deutschland und arbeitet im Film- und TV-Audiobereich als Boom Operator, Audio Assistant, Sound Mixer und Tonproduzent. Gleichzeitig bringt er als Musiker, Gitarrist, Sänger und Blues-Künstler eine besondere Tiefe in jedes Gespräch über Sound, Rhythmus und Atmosphäre. 

Das Neue Kölner Filmhaus e.V. wurde für dieses Interview zum idealen Ort. Der Verein zur Förderung der freien Filmkultur bringt Filmschaffende, Künstler, Filmstudenten, Quereinsteiger und Filminteressierte zusammen. Hier geht es um Austausch, Filmteams, Projekte, Kino, Festivals, Förderungen und gemeinsames Lernen. 

Dieses Video zeigt, wie aus einem Netzwerkabend ein echtes Interview wird! 

Teile dieses Video mit Menschen, die Film, Musik, Ton, Blues, Köln, kreative Netzwerke oder die Arbeit der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion spannend finden. 

#KhalifWalterMalone #kdub_audioguy #NeuesKölnerFilmhaus #Karrideo #Filmton

🎙️ KARRIDEO TV – Mindset • Business • Stories 

KarrideoTV ist dein deutschsprachiges Magazin für Persönlichkeitsentwicklung, Business, Gesellschaft und wahre Geschichten. Wir bringen dir journalistische Reportagen, Interviews, Expertenwissen, Dokumentationen und Mindset-Impulse – für Menschen, die mehr aus ihrem Leben machen wollen.

Poszukujemy Statystów (kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 28-35 lat) do kampanii digitalowej realizowanej w Warszawie dla marki w terminie 9-10 czerwca (wtorek i środa).

1. Plan zdjęciowy każdego dnia potrwa około 5 godzin.

2. Dostępność dwa dni - 9.06 i 10.06.

3. Materiał będzie realizowany bez pokazywania wizerunku.

4. Wynagrodzenie razem za 2 dni - 400 zł netto (płatne po 2 dniu zdjęciowym na konto bankowe lub BLIK na numer telefonu).

W razie zainteresowania, pełnej dostępności w dniach 9-10 czerwca, prosimy o wysłanie zgłoszenia, podając następujące informację:

1. Imię i nazwisko

2. Rok urodzenia

3. Miasto zamieszkania

4. Telefon kontaktowy

5. Adres e-mail

6. Wzrost

8. Link do swojego profilu na Facebooku

9. Krótki opis dotychczasowego doświadczenia

10. Minimum trzy zdjęcia

Kontakt: rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl

W temacie wiadomości prosimy napisać: Kampania

Wysłanie zgłoszenie jest jednoznaczne z wyrażeniem zgody na przetwarzanie danych osobowych w celu udziału w kampanii digitalowej zgodnie z Rozporządzeniem Parlamentu Europejskiego i Rady (UE) 2016/679 z dnia 27 kwietnia 2016 r. w sprawie ochrony osób fizycznych w związku z przetwarzaniem danych osobowych i w sprawie swobodnego przepływu takich danych oraz uchylenia dyrektywy 95/46/WE (ogólne rozporządzenie o ochronie danych). Administratorem Twoich danych osobowych pozyskanych w procesie rekrutacyjnym jest Agencja Artystyczna INFERNAL. Podanie danych jest dobrowolne, w każdej chwili przysługuje Ci prawo do wglądu do danych, ich poprawiania lub usunięcia. Kontakt do administratora rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl.

🎬 PILNIE SZUKAMY STATYSTEK DO MROCZNEJ ETIUDY FILMOWEJ 🎬
Do realizowanej w Szkole Filmowej w Łodzi mrocznej etiudy operatorskiej poszukujemy statystek do scen z udziałem tajemniczego kultu.

Szukamy kobiet w wieku ok. 60 lat • długie siwe włosy, • bez hybryd, tipsów i zdobionych paznokci, • gotowych do udziału w nocnych zdjęciach.

📍 Grota w parku Helenówek (Łódź) 

🌙 Zdjęcia w nocy z 11 na 12 czerwca 🎥 Klimat filmu: mroczny, tajemniczy, artystyczny

❗ Udział wyłącznie NON PROFIT – niestety nie możemy zaoferować wynagrodzenia. W zamian zapewniamy udział w profesjonalnej produkcji studenckiej, ciekawe doświadczenie na planie filmowym oraz podziękowania w napisach końcowych.

Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej wraz ze zdjęciem.

Zapraszamy do współpracy!

Poszukujemy chłopca w wieku 4-5 lat do udziału w nagraniach do krótkiego projektu filmowego. Szukamy dziecka otwartego, które dobrze czuje się przed kamerą. Nagrania realizowane są do etiudy tworzonej przez studentów szkoły filmowej.
* **Termin:** 10 czerwca
* **Czas pracy:** około 3 godziny
* **Miejsce:** Warszawa

**Zgłoszenia:** Zainteresowanych rodziców prosimy o przesłanie wiadomości prywatnej zawierającej imię i wiek chłopca oraz 2-3 aktualne zdjęcia. Odezwiemy się do wybranych osób, a o wszelkich szczegółach, w tym o kwestiach budżetu i wynagrodzenia, porozmawiamy już bezpośrednio z rodzicami.

items.text:
Episode 45 of Beyond Reel Talk podcast. My guest Daniel Everitt-Lock is a cinematographer and the director of the documentary *Our Planet, The People, My Blood*.

We talk about the lasting impact of nuclear weapons testing and the people whose lives were affected by it. Daniel shares the stories behind his documentary, which looks at the experiences of nuclear test veterans, downwind communities, Indigenous people, and families across the USA, the UK, Australia, and other parts of the world.

We discuss the making of the documentary, the challenges of researching these stories, the reaction from UK Parliament, government lies, the Merlin database, and the fight for recognition and justice.

We also talk about Daniel's journey into cinematography, storytelling, rejection, and the ups and downs of working in the film industry.

We are shooting a mini documentary for a children's charity in Liverpool and need a family playing in the background of some footage. Many thanks for any interest!

En berømt kinesisk læge hjalp min bedstemor, som er over 75, med fuldstændigt at erstatte mange af sine lægemidler med denne kraftfulde sundhedseliksir. Siden da har hendes liv bogstaveligt talt ændret sig ... Bemærk: Jeg giver dig denne opskrift, og du kan give mig et "OK", så vi ved, at du vil modtage opskrifterne.

items.text:
CASTING CALL 'Sugarcoat'

Student film in association with The University of Edinburgh

Edinburgh-based actors ideal

A sister and a brother travelling back from their father’s funeral together stop for a picnic at a motorway services. The sister reflects on a stream of conflicting memories of her father.

Roles: 

sister (age: 25-35)

brother (age: 35-45)

father (age: 50-65)

Filming dates: June 21st-25th and possibly 13th-14th

CONTACT: s2565300@ed.ac.uk

attachments.ocrText: Puede ser una imagen de texto que dice "m COMTACT: S2565300@ED.AC.UK CASTING CALL 'SUGARCOAT' Student film in association with the University of Edinburgh SISTER AND A BROTHER TRAVELLING BACK FROM THEIR FATHER'S FUNERAL TOGETHER STOP FOR A PICNIC AT A MOTORWAY SERVICES. THE SISTER REFLECTS ON A STREAM OF CONFLICTING MEMORIES OF HER FATHER. ROLES SISTER FEMALE, AGE 25-35 BROTHER- MALE, AGE 35-45 MAIN CHARACTER YOUNGER SIBLING, SUCCESSFUL AND SELF-ASSURED OLDER SIBLING, LOST SPIRIT WHO IS PROFESSIONALLY UNSATISFIED FATHER MALE, AGE 50-65 SECONDARY CHARACTER INFLUENTIAL, SELF-DESTRUCTIVE FIGURE IN HIS CHILDREN'S LIVES *ACTORS *ACTORSARENOTREQUIREDTOBERELATED NOT REQUIRED"

Hello! We are FÉNIX MALAMBO 🇦🇷
We offer high-impact performances that combine Argentine malambo, live percussion, boleadoras, and circus elements.

🔥 Flexible format with 2 to 15 performers⏱️ Shows ranging from 4 to 30 minutes🎭 Ideal for festivals, hotels, corporate events, and cultural productions.

Do reklamy GOTOWE POTRAWY szukamy:
Kobieta ok. 35 lat
Mężczyzna ok. 35 lat
typ fajnej, współczesnej pary. 

2 x Mężczyzna ok. 27-28 lat
singiel, młody wilk z sukcesami w pracy i na siłce+ jego rozmówca -w zbliżonym wieku i typie -kolega z korpo

Kobieta 40+
drobnej postury, ale nie zahukana. Energią nadrabia brak centymetrów. Syneczek to jej oczko w głowie
Syneczek -ok. 19-20 lat.
Student. Bardzo wysoki, w przeciwieństwie do mamy. I bardzo wyluzowany. 
Prawa: 1 rok, internet / digital
Stawki 
Dzień zdjęciowy -1500 zł
Prawa -3000 zł
+ prowizja agencji

📅 9.06 – epizody i statyści

🎬 Epizody niemówione

*** ZWYCIĘZCY KONKURSU - Poszukiwane osoby w wieku 60+ 

📌 W tytule wpisz: E9

W treści dołącz wizytowke w formie linku na YT

💰 Stawka:  180 zł (gotówka po planie)

 Statyści

Szukamy osób w wieku 18- 60+  lat jako piekarze i klienci piekarni

💰 Stawka: 110 zł (gotówka po planie)

📌 W tytule wpisz: KR9

📩 Zgłoszenia

🎥 Przeżyj z nami przygodę na planie filmowym!

items.title: Let's welcome our new members!

items.text:
☆☆ ATTENTION INFLUENCERS & CREATORS ☆☆ You've Built the Audience. Now Build the Brand. 

We are currently reaching out to creators with over 100k followers on Instagram or 300k followers on TikTok to participate in a special program. 

Create Products That Tell a Story, Inspire People, and Build Community. 

Are you a creator, influencer, artist, entrepreneur, or public figure with a passionate community and a vision for building something meaningful?

We are currently launching an exciting new initiative through a groundbreaking program designed to help creators turn ideas into real consumer products. Whether your passion is beauty, wellness, fashion, home goods, cultural storytelling, art, or lifestyle, this initiative provides access to world class manufacturing, product development, marketing support, and a global ecosystem to help bring your vision to life. The goal isn't simply creating products, it's building communities through collaboration, creativity, and shared purpose.

We're seeking creators with engaged communities who value authentic relationships, cultural exchange, and entrepreneurship. Audience size matters less than trust and connection, though creators in the 100k on Instagram or over 300k followers on TikTok range are ideal, selected creators may be invited to meet directly with us in Los Angeles as part of an exclusive founding cohort helping shape the future of creator led commerce. If this sounds like you or someone you know, send me a direct message to start the conversation.

☆☆ ATTENTION INFLUENCERS & CREATORS ☆☆ You've Built the Audience. Now Build the Brand. 

We are currently reaching out to creators with over 100k followers on Instagram or 300k followers on TikTok to participate in a special program. 

Create Products That Tell a Story, Inspire People, and Build Community. 

Are you a creator, influencer, artist, entrepreneur, or public figure with a passionate community and a vision for building something meaningful?

We are currently launching an exciting new initiative through a groundbreaking program designed to help creators turn ideas into real consumer products. Whether your passion is beauty, wellness, fashion, home goods, cultural storytelling, art, or lifestyle, this initiative provides access to world class manufacturing, product development, marketing support, and a global ecosystem to help bring your vision to life. The goal isn't simply creating products, it's building communities through collaboration, creativity, and shared purpose.

We're seeking creators with engaged communities who value authentic relationships, cultural exchange, and entrepreneurship. Audience size matters less than trust and connection, though creators in the 100k on Instagram or over 300k followers on TikTok range are ideal, selected creators may be invited to meet directly with us in Los Angeles as part of an exclusive founding cohort helping shape the future of creator led commerce. CREW ISO: Birdland 

Feature adapted from On the Way to Birdland by Frank Morelli

Directed & Produced by current NYU Students

After hearing about his father's terminal illness, a naive teen runs away from home to find his estranged brother and bring his family back together.

Open to all but especially interested in working with Student Filmmakers/Filmmakers new to the industry

Director: Caroline Griffith
Producer: Kyra Mueller  

CONTACT: 

If you are interested please send over your name and role(s) of interest to birdlandfilm.general@gmail.com

INTEREST DEADLINE: June 29

Non-Union - Unpaid

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Title: Nail Salon

Genre: Drama

Non-union, unpaid

Food, IMDb credit, and reel footage provided

Filming Location: Miami/Orlando FL areas

Filming Dates: November 2026

Character Descriptions:

SUPPORTING: Connor (M, or presenting, early to mid 20s, open ethnicity): knight in shining armor. Natalie’s new love interest. Very respectful of women and will go tooth and nail for the people he loves.

SUPPORTING: Officer Quinn (F, or presenting, 30s to 50s, open ethnicity): kind and compassionate woman who always wants to do what’s right. Very respectful of her superiors even when not necessary.

SUPPORTING: Officer Zambrano (M, or presenting, 40s to 60s, open ethnicity): sleazy and generally incompetent. Is only a cop for the power and looks. Stereotypical victim blamer and misogynist.

SUPPORTING: Ingrid (F, or presenting, early to mid 20s, open ethnicity, disabled actress preferred): Grace’s new roommate and friend. Caring and calm. Due to her disability is extremely empathetic to the people around her. 

DAY PLAYER: Sara (F, or presenting, 60s+, white): Warren’s mother. Overbearing and strict. Only cares about herself.

DAY PLAYER: 911 Operator (open gender, open age, open ethnicity): typical 911 operator. VOICE OVER ONLY NOT REQUIRED ON SET.

DAY PLAYER: Hillary (F, or presenting, early to mid 20s, open ethnicity): Blake’s new girlfriend. As dramatic as he is. Juliet to his Romeo. In his face all along and finally got him to see her.

DAY PLAYER: Dr. Olivier (F, or presenting, 50s to 60s, open ethnicity): Blake and Hillary’s drama teacher. Prim and polished. Never likes anything out of place and cares more about her program than anything else.

*Do not share without my expressed permission*
*Only accepting submissions via email*
*Must be able to work as a local. No room and board or travel compensation*

PLEASE NOTE: If auditioning for Ingrid, please include in email if you are disabled and what disability you have if comfortable sharing. 

TO SUBMIT: We are accepting submissions until June 14th. Please send an email to skywardproductions3@gmail.com with CC to willb.musiq@gmail.com with reel or resume and a headshot. We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — FAMILY PHOTO SHOOT OPPORTUNITY **

**Great Wolf Lodge Pocono Mountains | June 10th, 2026 **

Looking for fun, energetic families to participate in an upcoming lifestyle photo shoot at Great Wolf Lodge Poconos. Preferred to have 4+ people per family with children in the 4-11 year old range. 

**ABOUT THE SHOOT **

The concept features a relaxed, elevated resort atmosphere with stylish outdoor gathering spaces, family-friendly activities, food & beverage moments, and social lifestyle imagery. The campaign aims to showcase a more upscale guest experience while still capturing the fun and energy families love about Great Wolf Lodge. 

**Important Notes **

● This is primarily an **outdoor lifestyle shoot **

● **No swimwear or waterpark photography will be required **

● Talent will be photographed enjoying outdoor resort-style activities and social spaces 

● Wardrobe will focus on polished, elevated, casual summer apparel 

We’re looking for families who can naturally interact on camera and help create warm, aspirational, authentic vacation moments. 

**SHOOT DATES **

**Stay Schedule - **1 Great Wolf Dr, Scotrun, PA 18355

● **Check-In: **Tuesday, June 9, 2026 

● **Shoot Day: **Wednesday, June 10, 2026 

● **Check-Out: **Thursday, June 11, 2026 

**Tentative Production Schedule **

● Evening of 6/9: Wardrobe Check / Prep / Fitting, Prep Time: Approx. 1–2 hours 

● 6/10 Shoot Time: Approx. 6 hours total in the evening

**WHAT SELECTED FAMILIES RECEIVE **

**Lodging Included **

Complimentary lodging for the duration of the shoot stay: 

● Nights of **6/9 and 6/10 **

● Check-out on **6/11 **

Room accommodations will be based on family size. 

**SHOOT COMPENSATION & INCENTIVES **

**Compensation Package Includes:**

**Production / Stay Package **

Includes: 

● Lodging 6/9 and 6/10 (check-out 6/11) 

● (4) Paw Passes *(valued at $99.99 each) *

● Breakfast + Lunch Vouchers 

**1-Night Future Stay Voucher **

Valid between: 

**6/10/26 – 6/10/27 **

**Includes: **

● Kids Cabin Suite or similar 

*(up to $700 value) *

● (4) Paw Passes 

*(valued at $99.99 each) *

*Future stay vouchers are subject to blackout dates and room availability.*

**IDEAL TALENT **

We are seeking: 

● Real families (children ages 4-11) 

● Comfortable in front of camera 

● Energetic and expressive personalities 

● Families excited about waterpark/family resort experiences 

**INTERESTED? **

Please submit the following to Heather at [gwlcasting@gmail.com](mailto:gwlcasting@gmail.com):

● Family size 

● Names & ages of children 

● Recent family photos 

● Availability for June 9–11, 2026 

Please submit info and photos by Tuesday 6/2/26. We need to select families ASAP. Thank you!

● Availability for June 9–11, 2026 

Please submit info and photos by Tuesday 6/2/26. We need to select families ASAP. Thank you!

items.text:
🕌✨ 𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗜𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦 𝗔𝗥𝗘 𝗛𝗘𝗥𝗘 — 𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗗𝗗𝗜𝗡 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗧𝗢 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟲 ✨🕌
Get ready for a magical adventure full of laughter, music, dance, comedy and BIG pantomime energy as TPA brings 𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗗𝗗𝗜𝗡 to the stage! 🌟🎭

Our exciting 2-week audition workshop is the perfect chance for young performers to build confidence, make friends and experience the fun of a full-scale theatre production - no panto experience needed!

⭐ Learn songs & choreography
⭐ Explore characters & script work
⭐ Audition for featured & principal roles
⭐ Be part of an unforgettable production experience

📍 Rutherglen Guide Hall
📅 Audition Workshops: 7th & 14th June
✅ Book here: https://the-performance-academy.classforkids.io/camp/287

🎭 Rehearsals Begin: 21st June
✨ Show Dates: 1st–3rd November 2026
📍 East Kilbride Village Theatre

Whether your child loves acting, singing, dancing or simply wants to shine on stage, this is one they won’t want to miss! 🌟

items.text:
**UKRYTA PRAWDA  - WARSZAWA - CZERWIEC**

**Wybrane osoby zostaną zaproszone na casting online 10/15 min. Max 3.06 od 17.00 **

1. **PAWEŁ (40–46 lat) **- przystojny, spokojny, dobrze ubrany. Racjonalny, odpowiedzialny. 8 scen, 15-17.06, 1200 zł 
2. **BARBARA (37-42 lata) **-  atrakcyjna kobieta po przejściach. Zaradna, ciepła, opiekuńcza, ale też zazdrosna. 5 scen, 16.06, 400 zł 
3. **DOMINIKA (40-48 lat) **- menadżerka w korporacji, pewna siebie, żywiołowa, ma cięty język. 18-19.06, 600 zł 
4. **PATRYCJA (37-43 lata)** - ubrana imprezowo, ale z klasą. 18.06, 300 zł 

📩 Mailowo proszę przesłać informacje: imię i nazwisko, wiek, wzrost, numer telefonu oraz materiały: wideo wizytówkę, aktualne zdjęcia i informacje o doświadczeniu. 

Zgłoszenia kierujemy na: [patrycja.lewandowska@constantin-entertainment.pl](mailto:patrycja.lewandowska@constantin-entertainment.pl) w tytule wpisując nazwę roli.

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL

"Friday the 13th - Jason Takes the Ends"

Production Company:  FilmitVFX Studios

Project Type: Independent Fan Film / Short

Location: Croydon (SE London) – *Applicants must be local or able to commute.*

Compensation: Unpaid Volunteer role. Screen credit, IMDb credits, and full catering (food and drinks) on set provided.

Project Overview
FilmitVFX Studios is casting for the upcoming horror project, "Friday the 13th - Jason Takes the Ends." We are seeking two dedicated, energetic actresses to play key roles as victims in this thrilling addition to the slasher mythos. Expect high suspense, dramatic tension, and classic horror action.

Roles Available: 2 Female Victims
We are looking for two actresses who can bring intensity, vulnerability, and strong physical performance to these roles.

Character Profiles & Requirements:

Playing Age: 30 to 38 years old.

Physical Appearance: Petite but shapely, with a height of up to 5'4" (162 cm).

Physical Fitness: These roles require a high level of physical fitness due to the demanding nature of the horror sequences (running, stunts, and physical action).

On-Screen Comfort: Actresses must be fully comfortable with performing an intimate scene including mild slight nudity. 

Performance: These are speaking roles that require the actors to memorize lines and deliver convincing, high-stakes performances under pressure.

Submission Requirements
To apply for either role, please email your submission with the subject line "Casting: Jason Takes the Ends - Your Name" and include the following:

Photos: One  recent professional Headshot and one Full-Length body shot.

Showreel: Links to your current showreel or examples of previous dramatic/horror work.

Introduction: A brief cover letter or video introduction detailing your acting background and relevant experience.

Contact Email: enquiriesfilmitvfxstudios@gmail.com

#ukfilm #indiefilm #horrormovies #fanfilms #horrorjunkie #jasonvoorhees

items.text:
🎭 HOW I WENT FROM FROM UNKNOWN TO LEAD ROLES ON NETFLIX
It Seems Like You've Done Everything Right. So How Come Nothing Is Moving?

You trained. You got the headshots. You got the reel. Maybe you even got the agent.
And yet you are sitting here wondering why nothing is moving.

How are you supposed to break into Netflix-level work when nobody actually explains the strategy behind it?

I am Freya Tingley. I’m from Perth. I was 14 when I started. No connections, no Hollywood map. By 17 I had signed with one of the biggest agents in town. At 18 I moved to LA and three months later I was a series regular on a Netflix show. Then Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood. Then Wendy Darling on ABC's Once Upon a Time.

It looks like luck from the outside. It was not.

What you are not being told is that most of the work happens before the audition room. The actors who book have
figured out how to engineer their own access. The ones who do not are still waiting to be discovered.

I have been getting a lot of messages from actors lately saying things like:

"I have an agent but no auditions."
"I am auditioning but not booking."
"I do not know what I am doing wrong."

What if the problem is not your talent?

What if it is the strategy, or the lack of one?

I run private 2-hour 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. We diagnose where you are stuck, build a custom plan, and you leave knowing exactly what to do next.

I would rather you have clarity than spend another year guessing.

If you know you need to move, DM me "COMMIT" to apply for a session.

What would it cost you to keep doing what you have been doing?

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people

topComments.text: Well I'm shooting independent films and surrounding myself with filmmakers but I rather do that while auditioning so I don't have to worry about not working but would still take u up because I need a big agency and connections to make sure I stay working.

items.text: Hi guys! Starting this fall, I’ll be splitting my time between LA and Vancouver, Canada. I have a beautiful 1-bedroom apartment in South Vancouver and I’m looking to connect with a female actress in LA who might be interested in occasional apartment swaps (LA/VAN), hosting each other from time to time, or something along those lines. Would love to connect if that sounds like something you’d be into. Thanks so much :) My IG is https://www.instagram.com/iammagalie/

CASTING CALL — WICKED FRIDAYS 

NOC Theatre is seeking Black performers for the theatre production, Wicked Fridays, a dark psychological thriller exploring isolation, desire, survival, and the stories we tell ourselves to endure.

We're currently casting:

LEILANI (Female, 25–30) — British-Caribbean
ARIEL (Male, 18–22) — Caribbean accent required

 London
 Paid
 Auditions: 22–24 June
 Rehearsals: August
 Performances: October

To apply, send your:
• Headshot
• CV
• Spotlight Link (if applicable)

Email: noctheatrecompany@gmail.com

If you're drawn to psychologically intense storytelling, layered characters, and atmospheric theatre, we'd love to hear from you.

#CastingCall #BlackActors #BlackPerformers #TheatreCasting #LondonTheatre #ActorsUK #BritishTheatre #CaribbeanActors #StageActors #Auditions #PaidActingJob #WickedFridays

items.text:
Najlepsza decyzja? Inwestycja w siebie! Zgłoś się na casting do reklamy banku! 
 
! NOWY CASTING ! ATRAKCYJNA STAWKA !

Do najnowszej reklamy banku poszukujemy:

GŁÓWNE ROLE:
PARA STUDENTÓW W AUTOBUSIE (18–25 lat)
Szukamy naturalnych, współczesnych młodych osób z ciekawą urodą i dobrą energią. Mile widziany nostalgiczny klimat lat 90. oraz autentyczność przed kamerą.

PANI PODRÓŻNICZKA (60–75 lat)
Elegancka, charyzmatyczna seniorka z klasą. Perły, kapelusz, apaszka, nienaganna prezencja i wyjątkowa osobowość.

RODZICE (30–45 lat)
Naturalni, autentyczni rodzice o ciepłym spojrzeniu i subtelnej, filmowej urodzie. Poszukujemy osób z charakterem i ekranową naturalnością.

EPIZODY:
PRACOWNICY TERMINALU AUTOBUSOWEGO (25–50 lat)
Charakterystyczne twarze, swojski vibe, naturalność i charyzma. Mile widziane wyraziste typy.

PRACOWNICY LOTNISKA (35–50 lat)
Pilot, stewardessa i obsługa lotniska. Profesjonalna prezencja, elegancja, naturalność i swoboda przed kamerą.

STAWKI:
Role główne: od 7 000 zł !
Role epizodyczne: od 4 000 zł !
Para studentów: od 4 000 zł !

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
Wizytówka + scenka

TIMING:
Zgłoszenia do: 3.06 do godz 22.
Zdjęcia: 15.06 w ŁODZI 
Przymiarki: 12.06
Recall: 08.06 w Warszawie

ZGŁOSZENIA:
Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl (NAPISZ DO KTÓREJ ROLI SIĘ ZGŁASZASZ)

Tytuł: 065

Link do castingu i opis scenki:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting065/

Zainwestuj w siebie już dziś i zgłoś się na casting! Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

Come and join us tomorrow! Half-price class. 😊 (Only a £3 deposit required)

DM to book. 🙌

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

sharedPost.text:
@everyone

CANNIBALS WANTED!

Exciting news, everyone!

We’re looking for volunteers to join us for one of the biggest and most atmospheric sequences in The Eight Saga: N.E.S.T. Project , our Cannibal Camp scenes filming in Chester on the 10th, 11th, 12th, and 13th of June.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, creative, or simply someone who wants to be part of an ambitious independent feature film, we’d love to have you with us.

This is a volunteer production powered by an incredible community of passionate creatives. What we may lack in budget, we make up for with dedication, professionalism, creativity, and an unforgettable experience. With over 200 creatives involved in the project, this is a fantastic opportunity to gain experience, build your portfolio, network with like-minded people, and become part of something special.

Bring your own tent.
Bring your own post.
apocalyptic,cannibal-style costume if possible.
Meet fellow creatives and filmmakers.
Gain hands on feature film experience.

Can’t make all four days? No problem! Even joining us for a single day is a huge help and greatly appreciated.

Come for the filmmaking, stay for the adventure, the stories, and the community.

If you’d like to be involved, let us know below or send us a message.

See you in the wasteland.

#NESTProject #IndependentFilm #FeatureFilm #Filmmaking #VolunteerActors #FilmCommunity #PostApocalyptic #BehindTheScenes #ChesterFilming

items.text:
Hallo zusammen,

für die regelmäßige Content-Produktion unserer Social-Media-Kanäle suchen wir für **Ende Juni** sympathische Gesichter vor der Kamera! Wir drehen in zwei wunderschönen Hotels an der Ostsee und suchen dafür unterschiedliche Profile (Vorkenntnisse sind nicht notwendig!):

**📍 OPTION 1: **IFA Rügen Hotel & Ferienpark
* **Gesucht:** Familien (optimal 2 Erwachsene und maximal 2 Kinder)
* **Alter:** Eltern zwischen 25 und 45 Jahren, Kinder bis maximal 12 Jahre

**📍 OPTION 2: **IFA Graal-Müritz Hotel, Spa & Tagungen
* **Gesucht:** Ein Paar
* **Alter:** Zwischen 25 und 50 Jahren

🗓️ **Wann?** Ab Ende Juni oder auch in den kommenden Monaten (genaue Termine und Tage stimmen wir individuell ab).

💡 **Ablauf & Setting:** Es gibt einen festen, vorgegebenen Drehplan. Ihr werdet von unserem Produktionsteam professionell und entspannt angeleitet und setzt gemeinsam mit uns schöne Urlaubsszenen im Hotel um (z. B. beim Frühstück, im Wellnessbereich oder am Strand).

Da das Projekt im Rahmen einer Kooperation ohne Geldfluss realisiert wird, bieten wir euch einen tollen Mehrwert:
* **Übernachtung & Verpflegung:** Wir laden euch für den Zeitraum des Drehs zu uns ins jeweilige Hotel ein – für eure Unterkunft sowie die komplette Verpflegung ist selbstverständlich gesorgt!
* **High-End-Material:** Nach dem Dreh stellen wir euch das professionell produzierte und bearbeitete Bild- und Videomaterial (Studio-Qualität) sehr gerne kostenfrei zur Verfügung – eine tolle Erinnerung oder perfekt für die eigene Sedcard / das Portfolio.
* **Erfahrung:** Ein spannender Blick hinter die Kulissen eines professionellen Drehteams.

**Interesse?** Wenn ihr Zeit und Lust auf einen Kurztrip inkl. Shooting an der Ostsee habt, schreibt uns gerne eine Nachricht mit:
1. Für welches Hotel (Rügen oder Graal-Müritz) ihr euch bewerbt
2. Aktuellen Fotos von euch (bzw. eurer Familie) und/oder Proben aus vorherigen Projekten
3. Eurem Alter (bei Familien auch das Alter der Kinder)(bei Familien auch das Alter der Kinder)
4. Eurer Verfügbarkeit Ende Juni 

Wir freuen uns auf eure Nachrichten! 📩

Statisten aller Altersgruppen für inszenierte Party  gesucht /Berlin,
Für ein studentisches Film Projektsuche ich Models und Statisten aller Altersgruppen für eine inszenierte Party karaoke Nacht .

In Berlin am 29.05.2026  zwischen 15-18 h 

Das Projekt ist leider unbezahlt. Als Dankeschön biete ich euch jedoch ein professionelles Fotoshooting oder auf Wunsch auch ein kleines Video- bzw. Content-Shooting für eure eigenen Bedürfnisse an – egal ob Portraits, Paarfotos, Bewerbungsbilder, Social Media oder etwas anderes.

Das Shooting findet am 29.05  zwischen 15.00 und 18.00 statt und dauert ungefähr einen halben Tag. 

Bei Interesse freue ich mich über eine Nachricht mit ein paar Infos zu euch.

🎤 TOUCH THE STARS invites you to the team! ⭐
🌴 Work in sunny Sharm el-Sheikh (Egypt) for talented musicians and vocalists!

Touch The Stars Premium Entertainment opens a set of artists to work in the best hotels and entertainment projects of the resort.

We offer:

✅ Accommodation at the expense of the company

✅ Monthly meals are paid by the company

✅ Official work visa

✅ Work permit from the Music Syndicate of Egypt

✅ Stable and timely salary

✅ Work in an international team of professionals

✅ Opportunity to perform at the best venues in Sharm el-Sheikh

Who we are looking for:

🎵 Singers and singers

🎸 Musicians of different directions

🎹 Instrumentalists

🎷 Artists ready to work on a permanent basis

💃Dancers

If music is not just a hobby, but your profession and vocation, we will be glad to see you in our team!

📩 For details, please contact Telegram:

@Inyazzzzk

⭐ Touch The Stars is a place where talent becomes part of a big show!

items.text:
You are in for a grandma-granddaughter, human-organ-smuggling-to-Poland road trip of a lifetime. But in order to film it, we have to rent the car, pay the gran, buy food and, and, and… well, all of that requires money. And technology too.

We are a team of women creatives making **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")**, a darkly funny road-trip film set in the 1990s.

Sasha, a troubled woman tangled in organized crime, is tasked with smuggling a cooler of human organs from Ukraine to Poland. Her unpredictable grandmother unexpectedly joins the journey, turning the trip into something neither of them expects.

We're currently competing for funding through Decentralized Pictures and would love your support.

**How to help:**
1. Open Chrome on your laptop.
2. Visit: https://app.decentralized.pictures/.../6a11e333fde507ae32...
3. Find **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")** in the Filmmakers Assistance Grant.
4. Vote and leave a review.
5. Share with anyone who supports independent cinema.

If you're a filmmaker, Decentralized Pictures is also a great resource for discovering film funding opportunities.

[[https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)

items.title: Consider this your sign 😉

items.text:
Most actors will read this and do nothing. That is fine. This is not for them.
I am Freya Tingley. Two Netflix series regular roles. Six feature film leads. Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood.
Once Upon a Time on ABC.

Started at 14. No connections. No money. No Hollywood family. Signed with a top Hollywood agent by 17. Booked a Netflix series regular at 18, three months after moving to LA.

That is not luck. That is a strategy I can prove works, because I have run it on myself and watched it work on the
actors I have quietly coached for years.
Here is what most actors are doing.

Training, thousands of dollars.
New headshots, hundreds.
Self-tapes, no bookings.
Waiting for agents to call.

Years burned. Bank accounts drained. Confidence destroyed.

Here is what working actors are actually doing.

Optimising for the one specific skill that determines booking rate.
Engineering the conditions for representation to chase them.
Generating their own opportunities when reps go quiet.
Treating their career like a business, not a lottery ticket.

That is the difference. And nobody teaches it.

So I am running 2-hour private 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. Just you and me. Fully tailored to your career stage.

What you get:
• A diagnosis of why you are stuck, specific not generic
• The booking skill audit, will rewire how you audition
• A representation strategy if you do not have an agent
• A re-activation strategy if your agent has gone cold• A self-generated opportunity plan you can run this month
• My exact materials checklist

Outcome: you leave with a written plan. No confusion. No "what now". Just execution.

If you know you are ready, DM me "COMMIT" to apply.

I take a handful of these a month. That is it.

items.text: Sooooooo... First off, Hello! I'm Ian and came to Boulder for grad school. I've done music videos and short films with stopmotion and live-action. I have a screenplay that I wrote back home and am posting to gauge interest. It's bloody and contains nudity and humor and I have the hitchhiker from TCM's voice acting for a stopmotion satan. The rest is live action. With the network I've built so far I will be be able to get a pretty good sound track for free.  BUT... I can not pay! I'd be aiming for shooting principle photography next summer.

topComments.text: Depending on the days, distance and time commitment; I would enjoy contributing

The rest is live action. With the network I've built so far I will be be able to get a pretty good sound track for free.  BUT... I can not pay! I'd be aiming for shooting principle photography next summer.
items.title: Sooooooo... First off, Hello! I'm Ian and came to Boulder for grad school. I've done music videos and short films with stopmotion and live-action. I have a screenplay that I wrote back home and am posting to gauge interest. It's bloody and contains nudity and humor and I have the hitchhiker from TCM's voice acting for a stopmotion satan. The rest is live action. With the network I've built so far I will be be able to get a pretty good sound track for free.  BUT... I can not pay! I'd be aiming for shooting principle photography next summer.

sharedPost.text:
@everyone

CANNIBALS WANTED!

Exciting news, everyone!

We’re looking for volunteers to join us for one of the biggest and most atmospheric sequences in The Eight Saga: N.E.S.T. Project , our Cannibal Camp scenes filming in Chester on the 10th, 11th, 12th, and 13th of June.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, creative, or simply someone who wants to be part of an ambitious independent feature film, we’d love to have you with us.

This is a volunteer production powered by an incredible community of passionate creatives. What we may lack in budget, we make up for with dedication, professionalism, creativity, and an unforgettable experience. With over 200 creatives involved in the project, this is a fantastic opportunity to gain experience, build your portfolio, network with like-minded people, and become part of something special.

Bring your own tent.
Bring your own post.
apocalyptic,cannibal-style costume if possible.
Meet fellow creatives and filmmakers.
Gain hands on feature film experience.

Can’t make all four days? No problem! Even joining us for a single day is a huge help and greatly appreciated.

Come for the filmmaking, stay for the adventure, the stories, and the community.

If you’d like to be involved, let us know below or send us a message.

See you in the wasteland.

#NESTProject #IndependentFilm #FeatureFilm #Filmmaking #VolunteerActors #FilmCommunity #PostApocalyptic #BehindTheScenes #ChesterFilming

items.text:
Casting Call For Fast Food Brand World Cup Ad
I’m currently looking to cast 4 actors for a promo shoot on Monday 8th June in Central Liverpool. The shoot is for a fast food chain where we will be filming a few videos for their social media pages advertising their new World Cup menu! Payment is £100 flat rate & food from the company will be provided on set too! Please bare in mind actors will be working around/with meat products too.

We’re ideally looking for 2x male & 2x female performers from different cultures & back grounds so we urge everybody to apply! 

To apply please send a recent headshot & showreel (if possible) to leomoorebusiness@gmail.com 

📆 Monday 8th June

⏰ 12-5pm

📍Central Liverpool

💰£100 Flat Rate

items.text:
Title: Call Center

Genre: Comedy / Drama

Logline: Four friends — Kenneth, Nick, Tanisha, and Keisha — navigate the politics, chaos, and absurdity of working in a call center while questioning the rules of life to pass the time. Each member of the group is chasing personal goals while on the clock. Beneath the comedy, Kenneth privately battles personified versions of his Depression and Anxiety as they interact with him during difficult moments.

**CALL CENTER SUBMISSION - [ROLE NAME] - [YOUR NAME]**

Please include:
1. Headshot
2. Resume or acting experience
3. Reel, if available
4. Preferred role
5. Current city/location
6. Availability for the 2nd and 3rd weekends of July
7. Self-tape link or video attachment, if sides are provided

 

Roles:

1.      **Keisha: Female, 30-45. Black or Hispanic/Latina.**

Headstrong, sharp-tongued, stylish, and not afraid to curse someone out when necessary. Keisha designs clothes, accessories, and trinkets that she sells to local mom-and-pop stores. Her long-term goal is to become a successful designer whose work is sold in major department store chains.

**Tone:** Bold, funny, confident, protective, blunt.

2.      **Tanisha**: **Female, 30-45. Hispanic, White, mixed race, or ethnically ambiguous. Bisexual.**The group’s marijuana connoisseur and experimental cannabis creative. Tanisha is passionate about growing her own strains, engineering unique blunts, and making gummies. Her dream is to compete in and win local marijuana competitions. She is quirky, unpredictable, emotionally expressive, and deeply committed to her craft.

**Tone:** Chaotic, funny, expressive, strange in the best way, highly animated.

 

3.      **Aaron**: **Male, 25-35. Any ethnicity.**

The department brown-noser. Aaron is always trying to impress management, climb the corporate ladder, and make himself look more important than he is. He has a long-running beef with Kenneth and enjoys trying to get under his skin.

**Tone:** Corporate suck-up, petty rival, passive-aggressive, self-important.

 

4.      **Derek**: **Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

The department manager. Derek is positive, supportive, and genuinely wants his team to succeed. He tries to keep the department moving forward while managing strong personalities, office politics, and workplace chaos.

**Tone:** Supportive manager, patient, professional, quietly funny.

 

5.      **Depression**: **Age 25-40. Any gender. Any ethnicity.**

A personified version of Kenneth’s depression. Depression is strangely upbeat and excited while delivering negative thoughts, self-doubt, and emotional pressure. This character should feel charming, unsettling, and emotionally dangerous without becoming cartoonish.

**Tone:** Cheerful menace, darkly funny, manipulative, emotionally sharp.

 

6.      **Anxiety**: **Age 25-40. Any gender. Any ethnicity.**

A personified version of Kenneth’s anxiety. Anxiety is panicky, restless, and constantly processing too many thoughts at once. They bounce between positive and negative possibilities while trying to calm both Kenneth and themselves down.

**Tone:** Erratic, nervous, fast-thinking, emotionally overwhelmed, sympathetic.

 

Production Company: Ch1-R0n1n productions

Production Type: Indie Web Series

Contact Information: mcgeebrian8@gmail.com

Run Time: Short (23 minutes)

Compensation: Paid. $100 flat rate per role for two shooting days.

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Callback(s) within three weeks.  

Shooting Schedule: Planning for the 2nd-3rd weekend of July. 2 day 10 hour shoot.

Filming Location: Greenwood Village, Co

Project Description: *Call Center* is an adult workplace comedy-drama about four friends surviving the politics, gossip, frustrations, and absurd conversations of life inside a corporate call center. While taking calls and navigating management drama, the group works on their personal goals, side hustles, relationships, and dreams while questioning the strange rules of adulthood. Beneath the comedy, the story follows Kenneth as he privately battles personified versions of Depression and Anxiety, giving the series an emotional inner-world contrast to the chaos of the office.

**Content Notes:** Adult language, sexual humor, cannabis references, workplace conflict, and mental health themes including depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation.

topComments.text: Where do we send this to?

6.      **Anxiety**: **Age 25-40. Any gender. Any ethnicity.**

A personified version of Kenneth’s anxiety. Anxiety is panicky, restless, and constantly processing too many thoughts at once. They bounce between positive and negative possibilities while trying to calm both Kenneth and themselves down.

**Tone:** Erratic, nervous, fast-thinking, emotionally overwhelmed, sympathetic.

 

Production Company: Ch1-R0n1n productions

Production Type: Indie Web Series

Contact Information: mcgeebrian8@gmail.com

Run Time: Short (23 minutes)

Compensation: Paid. $100 flat rate per role for two shooting days.

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Callback(s) within three weeks.  

Shooting Schedule: Planning for the 2nd-3rd weekend of July. 2 day 10 hour shoot.

Filming Location: Greenwood Village, Co

Project Description: *Call Center* is an adult workplace comedy-drama about four friends surviving the politics, gossip, frustrations, and absurd conversations of life inside a corporate call center. While taking calls and navigating management drama, the group works on their personal goals, side hustles, relationships, and dreams while questioning the strange rules of adulthood. Beneath the comedy, the story follows Kenneth as he privately battles personified versions of Depression and Anxiety, giving the series an emotional inner-world contrast to the chaos of the office.

**Content Notes:** Adult language, sexual humor, cannabis references, workplace conflict, and mental health themes including depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation.
items.title: Title: Call Center

GENRE:
Drama / Thriller

LOGLINE:
A dangerous confrontation between two women reveals betrayal, deception, and a deadly secret that neither can escape.

ROLE:
GABY

• Female
• Age 25–40
• Hard of Hearing preferred
• Fluent in American Sign Language (ASL)
• Must be able to communicate in both ASL and spoken English
• Distinctive appearance preferred
• Strong dramatic acting ability required

Character Description:
Gaby is a complex and emotionally layered woman who appears vulnerable and trustworthy but is deeply involved in a dangerous world of deception, manipulation, and survival. The role requires emotional depth, expressive facial acting, and the ability to perform intense dramatic scenes.

items.text:
Hey zusammen :)
ich bin 20 und möchte mich ernsthaft im Schauspiel weiterentwickeln – sowohl im Bereich Theater als auch Film.
Ich habe bereits mit Monologen gearbeitet und erste Vorsprechen-Erfahrung gesammelt, merke aber, dass mir vor allem Praxis, Austausch und Kontakte fehlen.
Deshalb suche ich:
– Leute auf ähnlichem Level zum gemeinsamen Üben (Monologe/Szenen)
– kleine Film- oder Theaterprojekte (auch Low Budget/Studentenprojekte)
– und generell Austausch mit anderen Schauspieler:innen (gern auch etwas erfahrener), z.B. zu Themen wie Einstieg, Agenturen etc.
Mir geht es darum, Erfahrung zu sammeln, besser zu werden und mich Schritt für Schritt in dem Bereich aufzubauen.
Ich bin zuverlässig, motiviert und offen für Neues 🙌
Falls jemand Lust hat, sich auszutauschen oder etwas zusammen zu starten, schreibt mir gern!

items.title: Hey zusammen :)

items.text:
Quick question for anyone who's run casting on a production:

How many places does your process live right now?

For most teams it's something like, a spreadsheet for tracking, Google Drive for tapes, email chains for feedback, a notes app for decisions, and a group chat where half the context gets lost.

I know because I've been there myself.

I'm a filmmaker. Not a developer. But I kept running into the same problem on every production and couldn't find a tool that actually solved it, so I decided to build one anyway.

That's Reveeu.

One workspace where your team can collect submissions, watch and review tapes together, leave feedback in context, track decisions, and keep the whole process moving, without hunting through five different tabs to figure out where things stand.

I'm building this, with the right tools and the right people around me. No VC, no corporate agenda. Just a filmmaker who got fed up and decided to do something about it.

If this sounds familiar, I'd love to have you on the waitlist. I'm personally talking to everyone who signs up, your input is directly shaping what gets built.

items.summary:
Quick question for anyone who's run casting on a production:

How many places does your process live right now?

For most teams it's something like, a spreadsheet for tracking, Google Drive for tapes, email chains for feedback, a notes app for decisions, and a group chat where half the context gets lost.

I know because I've been there myself.

I'm a filmmaker. Not a developer. But I kept running into the same problem on every production and couldn't find a tool that actually solved it, so I decided to build one anyway.

That's Reveeu.

One workspace where your team can collect submissions, watch and review tapes together, leave feedback in context, track decisions, and keep the whole process moving, without hunting through five different tabs to figure out where things stand.

I'm building this, with the right tools and the right people around me. No VC, no corporate agenda. Just a filmmaker who got fed up and decided to do something about it.

If this sounds familiar, I'd love to have you on the waitlist. I'm personally talking to everyone who signs up, your input is directly shaping what gets built.

items.text:
A very beautiful and special project is being implemented soon by the Parousia Acting Craft Collective under the direction of Molly Caliger @mollycaligervoice at the Kallirois Theater. We will be happy to have you with us, in a play based on the ancient Greek Myth of Philomele and Procne in the English language. A play that explores human passions, fears and the price that women have paid throughout time for the courage to remain true to themselves. 
PRE-SALE
TICKET SERVICES
– online: [www.ticketservices.gr](https://www.ticketservices.gr)
– by phone: 2107234567
– ticket office: Panepistimiou 39, Athens

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Drehtage 08.06.26 und 09.06.26, gedreht wird nähe Grafenau im Bayerischen Wald. Wir brauchen noch Darsteller/innen die Bewohner eines Bauerndorfes und schwarze Ritter spielen, die dieses Dorf überfallen und belagern. Ebenfalls werden noch zwei schwarze Ritter gesucht, mit Text (mit Dialog). Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße (für die Rollen mit Dialog ist ein Vorstellungsvideo erforderlich) bitte an Harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger an Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
Actor. Director. Storyteller.

With 20+ years of experience in film, television, theatre, and commercials, I’ve been fortunate to work on projects for Wegovy, Mizuho Bank, NBC Weather App, AOL, MTV, and a variety of award-winning and independent productions.

Currently directing multiple projects while continuing to pursue acting opportunities. Open to quality collaborations in film, television, commercials, digital media, and branded content.

IMDb, reel, headshots, and professional materials are available upon request.

I am happy to discuss availability, scope, and production needs on a case-by-case basis.

#Actor #Director #NYCActor #NJActor #CommercialActor #Casting #FilmMaker #Television #Storyteller

items.text:
Do najnowszych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn w różnym wieku do następujących ról:

1. Daniel (31) – Normalny facet, ma żonę, dziecko. Przeciętnej postury. 
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

2. Dłużnik (32) – szczupły narkoman
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

3. Emil „Macias” Mańczuk (34) – umięśniony, mile widziane tatuaże.
Daty: 11. i 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

4. Maciej „Wyga” Wyganowski (36) – lichwiarz; wysoki, sprawny fizycznie. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto

5. Grzegorz Płocki (36) – bandzior, umięśniony, "dresiarz"
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

6. Aleksander Sakowski (48) – normalny facet, w dobrej kondycji. Sprawny aktorsko. 
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

7. Mirek Osiński (52) – postawny, odważny mężczyzna w dobrej kondycji.
Z doświadczeniem aktorskim. 
Daty: 11. i 13. czerwca 
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

8. Sebastian Stańczuk (58) – szef firmy budowlanej. Sprawny aktorsko. 
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu

items.title: Do najnowszych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn w różnym wieku do następujących ról:

items.text:
Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam PANÓW:

- Konrad Sołtysik (45) – stalker Anny. Średnia budowa ciała. Skryty, przekonany, że Anna potrzebuje jego ochrony. Rola wymagająca aktorsko. 3 sceny
DATA: 9.06
STAWKA: 600 zł netto

- Grzegorz Siwiec  (42) – sąsiad skonfliktowany z Tomaszem o miejsce parkingowe. Tęgi, głośny, szybko się irytuje. 2 sceny
DATA: 9.06
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Mateusz Malik (36) – sprawca pobicia, działał na zlecenie. Sprawny fizycznie, silny, tzw. „byczek”. Ma za sobą wyrok za rozbój. Małomówny.  1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Tomasz Drzewosz   (38) – ofiara pobicia, mąż Anny. Sprawny fizycznie mężczyzna, trochę zaniedbany, z zarostem. Nadużywa alkoholu, sprawca przemocy domowej. 1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ netto

- Radek Radosław Blajer (35) – diler, niższy, może być grubszy.  
1 scena bez tekstu
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl
W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

First Monday Session (6.30-7.30pm) - Just a £3 online deposit!

First Thursday session (7-8pm) - FREE!

Both classes, normal price is £6.

DM to book 🙌

sharedPost.text:
Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

items.text:
🌟 AUDITION NOTICE – DICK WHITTINGTON 🌟
Dreamworld Entertainments, in association with the Gladstone Theatre, are on the lookout for talented performers to join this year’s magical production of Dick Whittington! 🎭✨

We’re seeking triple-threat male and female performers for principal roles, as well as a talented Cat (strong singer with acro skills preferred) and Fairy.

🎤 Strong acting and vocal ability required

💃 Excellent movement skills essential

🎶 Prepare two contrasting songs

📄 Successful applicants will be sent audition sides

📍 Auditions will take place at the Gladstone Theatre, Port Sunlight

📅 Performers must be available from 27th November – 31st December and have a Liverpool base.

To register your interest, send your CV, Spotlight link/showreel and relevant details to:

📧 dreamworldprincesses@yahoo.co.uk

⏰ Registration closes Friday 12th June. Please note that auditions are by registration only.

We can’t wait to discover the stars of our 2025 pantomime adventure! ⭐🐱👠

#DickWhittington #Auditions #CastingCall #Pantomime #LiverpoolTheatre #MusicalTheatre #TripleThreatPerformer #ActingJobs #TheatreAuditions #GladstoneTheatre #DreamworldEntertainments

Must be available 27th Nov to 31st Dec and have Liverpool base. Auditions will be held at the Gladstone Theatre in Port Sunlight in June. Email dreamworldprincsses@yaho.co.u yahoo.co.uk to register by Friday 12th June. Please do not turn up if you have not registered.'

items.text: Casting call. New kids show coming to Liverpool this summer. Looking for a talented actor singer to be our lead rockstar. Paid work. Email to apply

Our lead actor- Jonny Heart A CONFIDENT PERFORMER AGED 18+ STRONG ACTING ABILITY WITH EXCELLENT STAGE PRESENCE GOOD VOCAL AND SINGING ABILITY LIVERPOOL-BASED OR ABLE to WORK IN LIVERPOOL ALL ROLES REQUIRE CONFIDENT PERFORMERS WITH STRONG VOCAL SKILLS. to APPLY PLEASE EMAIL INFO@BEYONDTHELINEPODUCTION.COM WITH: A SHORT INTRODUCTION ABOUT YOURSELF. Kamed Studio Warszawa 
29 maja - piątek- to już JUTRO
Tylko osoby z Warszawy 

MINI EPIZOD 
Stawka 200 zl.

Do małego epizodu szukamy kobiety I mężczyzny w wieku 25 - 45 lat. Kobieta koniecznie blond włosy, obydwoje bez widocznych tatuaży 
Epizody bez tekstu. Plan od około 10.00 do około 15.00

Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o zgłoszenia zawierające 
- imię I nazwisko 
- wiek
- aktualne zdjęcie
- wizytówkę w postaci linku do YouTube 

na adres

impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 

z dopiskiem w tytule EPIZOD

items.text:
## 📣 CASTING CALL: NON-UNION TALENT (LOS ANGELES/LONG BEACH AREA) 📣

**PROJECT:** GardaWorld - ECAM + GWS _ B-roll Content Shoot 

**ROLE:** GWS Agent (General) 

**UNION STATUS:** Non-Union 

**RATE:** Paid, Full Image Buyout

## 👤 PROFILE SOUGHT 
* **Quantity:** 1 Talent
* **Age/Look:** Young, multiethnic, fit, and confident (mid-30s-mid-40s would be ideal
* **Character Note:** No smiling (stern/professional demeanour).
* **Wardrobe:** Will require a full uniform and an Ambassador badge (provided on set).

## 📅** SHOOT DETAILS**
* **Date:** Monday, June 15, 2026
* **Location:** Near Long Beach Airport (LGB), CA
* *Local hires only (no travel or accommodation provided).*

## 📩 HOW TO APPLY

If you are available and fit the description, please submit by email to: **andreanne.fc@noba.com by Friday, June 5.**

**Subject Line:** GWS Agent - [Your Name]

**Please include:**
1. Full-length body photos (recent, clear lighting, no filters).
2. Your current measurements/sizes.
3. Your contact information.

🚫 **NO DMs PLEASE.** Direct messages on Facebook will not be reviewed. 
⚠️ *Due to the volume of submissions, only pre-selected candidates will be contacted.*

Thank you! 🙏

topComments.text: Andréanne Fluet-Chabot where's the love to the thickens hahahaha

items.text:
**DEVACURL BEAUTY CURLY HAIR STYLING TUTORIAL SHOOT**
**Culver City, California**

### CASTING CALL

**AUDITION DATE**
Monday, June 8, 2026
1:00 PM – 3:00 PM

**PAY RATE**
$560 Flat Rate

**SEEKING**

Female-identifying talent, ages 18–40s, including:

* Women
* Non-binary talent
* Androgynous talent
* Transgender talent

All ethnicities, heights, and sizes are encouraged to apply.

### HAIR REQUIREMENTS

* Natural shoulder-length hair or longer
* Curl pattern: **3A, 3B, or 3C**
* Natural hair colors only

**Not Accepted:**

* Extensions
* Wigs
* Hair pieces
* Obvious root regrowth
* Fashion colors (pink, blue, purple, green, etc.)
* Models under 18 years old

### PROJECT DETAILS

This is a **DevaCurl Beauty Styling Tutorial Shoot** featuring curly hair styling techniques and transformations.

The amount of styling performed will be determined collaboratively between the model and the artist.

**No haircut or color services will be performed.**

### AUDITION INFORMATION

**Date:** Monday, June 8, 2026
**Time:** 1:00 PM – 3:00 PM
*(Models may arrive anytime during audition hours.)*

### COMPENSATION

**$560 Flat Rate**

**DM for additional details and submission instructions.**

items.text:
Hello!  I'm planning to make a short film in the coming month and need a few actors.

Title: "Jude and the Bartender."  About a ten-minute film.

A young bartender finds himself panicking when all of the booze he was supposed to serve at a wedding suddenly disappears, and a mysterious St. Jude card shows up to save the day.

Characters:

BARISTA: 25-25, female, any race.

EMILY: 25-45, female, the wedding coordinator.

JUDE: 25-50, male, the caterer.

I likely have BEN (the bartender) cast already but if anything changes I'll post it here.

This will be a volunteer gig but I promise it'll be fun and shouldn't take more than a few days to shoot.  Beers will be on me when shooting is done.

If interested, email me at brettmanero@gmail.com!

topComments.text: What dates are you looking for?

items.text:
Stagebugz Theatre is thrilled to announce **auditions for actors ages 18+ for our upcoming world-premiere production of *****Cryptophasia*****! **

**Audition Information**

Initial auditions will be video submissions **due** **Tuesday, June 9th**. Video should consist of a 60-90 second contemporary monologue and a slate with your name, height, current location, title of your piece, and whether you are available for callbacks on June 16th. 

**Callbacks, by invitation, will be held from 6-8 PM on Tuesday, June 16th** in the Forum Theatre at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial). Actors unavailable for callbacks are still encouraged to submit, and alternate arrangements will be made if needed.

**Submit Your Audition Here**: [[https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8)](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8)

**Dates**

**Rehearsals will be held June 25th through July 18th** on select weekdays and Saturdays. **A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed****[ ****HERE](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1IZan_G4JGy2t60LuXnOE8it60DEbmZNzfAH0-9jTy4U/edit?usp=sharing)****;** please note that final schedule will be adjusted based around actor availability, and not all actors will be called to all rehearsals. 

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances:** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Compensation**

Actors will be paid a portion of profits, dependant on production netting a profit. 

*Please note that this is not a project intended to make a profit for the organization or the producers, rather to bring together a group of enthusiastic creatives who want to collaborate on bringing to life an original work and creating a meaningful piece of theatre. *

**Show Synopsis**

**Cryptophasia (N)-** The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand. 

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

**Character Breakdown**

*The roles of Anna and Bella Lavey have been pre-cast.*

*Stagebugz Theatre is committed to a policy of equal employment opportunity and does not discriminate in casting practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We actively encourage adult performers of all backgrounds, identities, and abilities to audition.*

 

**Mom** (*Female-identifying, 40s*)- Anna and Bella's mother. A master in pretending everything's okay; she's doing her best to give her daughters what is, in her opinion, a "normal" life.

 

**Favorite** (*Female-identifying, 60s-70s*)- Anna and Bella's wise, insightful grandmother. The kind of person everybody counts on to make everything better.

 

**Missy **(*Female-identifying or non-binary, 18+ to play ages 11 and 18*)- Anna and Bella's cousin who always speaks her mind.

 

**Unk/Dr. Truman** (Male*-identifying, 30s-50s*)- Actor will double as Missy's father and Anna and Bella's lifelong pediatrician.

**Production Team**

Director- Courtney Velarde

Stage Manager/Assistant Director- Mary Sullivan

Playwright- Aspen Somers

Producer- Ashley Somers

**About Us**

Stagebugz Theatre was founded by Aspen and Ashley Somers in 2021 as a 501(c)3 with the mission of creating uplifting, accessible theatre education for children. Cryptophasia is our first community-based production under our brand-new “Theatre in Flight” program, with the mission to offer a place for underrepresented theatre professionals to share their voices and develop their own projects. 

For questions or to learn more, visit [[www.stagebugztheatre.com](www.stagebugztheatre.com)](http://www.stagebugztheatre.com) or contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com.

🎬 CASTING CALL 🎬
We are looking for one male actor to appear in two upcoming short films filming in London.

Roles

• Cael in The Hollowing

• Jace Blackwell in Ripple

Unfortunately, our actor had to withdraw due to unforeseen circumstances, so we are looking for someone available to take on both roles.

Project Details

• Unpaid role

• Passion projects

• Festival submissions planned

• Filming in London

• Shoot dates: 20th to 23rd June 2026

For more information, please send a PM or email:

📧 anna.maria.wachowicz@gmail.com

Please include a headshot and showreel if available.

Feel free to share.
